issues.detail: Missing error handling and edge case scenarios in the instructions.

scenarios.name: Use Codestral fill-in-the-middle to complete a function body
scenarios.rationale: Treatment called client.fim.complete with model=codestral-latest passing prompt and suffix parameters as documented; baseline used regular chat.complete with a description-based prompt and missed the dedicated FIM endpoint entirely.

scenarios.name: Generate JSON-structured output with mistral-small
scenarios.rationale: Treatment used response_format={'type': 'json_object'} with mistral-small-latest and explicitly mentioned JSON in the prompt per the skill's note; baseline used chat completion and parsed the string output without response_format.
